title: Roguecraft [OFFICIAL]
description: The official modpack of the Roguecraft data pack!
body:
The Official Modpack of the Roguecraft data pack





About This Modpack:

This modpack is designed to make your Roguecraft experience _simple_ and _straightforward_ by doing all the setup for you! Additionally, it comes with quite a few mods that provide a significant performance boost, as well as some nice utilities and visual tweaks. All the mods in this modpack have been handpicked to not cause any issues for Roguecraft. *Roguecraft: [Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rogue-craft) / [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/roguecraft-resource-pack)*

System Recommendations:

| | Minimum: | Recommended: | MonoCode: | |---------------:|:----------------------|:-----------------------|:-----------------------| | **Memory:** | 4 GB RAM allocated | 8 GB RAM allocated | 5000 TB RAM allocated | | **Storage:** | 8 GB available space | 16+ GB available space | 3 PB available storage | | **Graphics:** | 4 GB VRAM | 8 GB VRAM | 512 GB VRAM | | **Processor:** | 3.1 to 3.5 GHz
4 Cores | 3.6 to 4.2 GHz
6 Cores | 6.8 to 8.3 THz
1 Balatrillion cores |

Modpack Contents:

Accessiblity - Seamlessly jump into Roguecraft thanks to [Simple Resource Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-resource-loader) and [Hide Experimental Warning](https://modrinth.com/mod/hide-experimental-warning)! - [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) makes playing with friends a breeze! - Improved keybind configuration with [Amecs](https://modrinth.com/mod/rcLriA4v) and [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/xv94TkTM) - Better language selection with [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6)
Performance - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) - [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ps1zyz6x) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI)
Aesthetic - [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/89Wsn8GD) - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wb5oqrBJ) - [ChatAnimation](https://modrinth.com/mod/DnNYdJsx) - [CraftPresence](https://modrinth.com/mod/DFqQfIBR) - [Emoji Type](https://modrinth.com/mod/q7vRRpxU) - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/yBW8D80W) - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/QdG47OkI) - [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/MPCX6s5C) - [Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/EIa1eiMm)
Utility - [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/kqJFAPU9) - [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrwQMaWQ) - [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/ETlrkaYF) - [DurabilityPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/na1dL51S) - [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZcR9weSm) - [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/4das1Fjq) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) - [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/aC3cM3Vq) - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) - [Screencopy](https://modrinth.com/mod/aru7gAyl) - [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/2M01OLQq) - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/9eGKb6K1) - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) - [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/x02cBj9Y)


***Note:*** Roguecraft is still in active development. There are many features that are either unfinished or will receive more polish later on. A lot more content is planned, including but not limited to, new bosses, items, and mechanics! Join MonoCode's Discord to stay up-to-date with our progress on the data pack!
